title: Baker Ross FN675 Candy Cane Mix & Match Decoration Kits – Pack of 8, Christmas Craft Sets for Festive Candy Cane Decorations
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Candy Cane Mix & Match Decoration Kits: Mix and match pieces to create eight festive candy cane decorations, perfect for hanging in classrooms or on Christmas trees.
Creative Holiday Craft: A fun and engaging project for children to add a sweet seasonal touch to any space.
Easy to Assemble: Simply stick the self-adhesive foam decorations onto the templates, add the hanging ribbon, and your candy cane decorations are ready—no glue required.

Included in the pack: This pack contains 8 Kits. Each kit includes template, self-adhesive foam decorations and ribbon for hanging. 8 assorted designs. Decoration height 14cm. Instructions included. No glue required

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 50 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
